Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a folder

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to rename folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is renaming folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing folder {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
